## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Security improvement

## Testing

Describe the Android devices, Android versions, browsers and operating systems used for testing.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit credentials, signing keys, private files or generated APKs.
- [ ] I tested the Android app.
- [ ] I tested the browser interface.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] I added or updated translations where needed.
